intent: Consolidate the remaining asset archive-loop gaps into ranked closure lanes with evidence, blockers, next actions, and no execution permission.
source_rule: This closure map decides nothing by itself. It is review evidence only; source moves, archive destinations, receipt writes, runtime sync, and deploy remain prohibited without exact approval.

closure_lanes.next_action: Promote the Studio-only image into assets-src, register it as Studio-only reference, or remove it from the working surface.
Keep as poster/reference output unless a human selects a specific image for promotion.
Keep as frozen incoming reference evidence unless a specific file is promoted through source registration.

decision_matrix.subject: codex_studio
decision_matrix.required_operator_action: Decide whether this Studio image should be promoted into data/assets-src/sprites, registered as Studio-only reference, or removed from the working surface.
decision_matrix.next_verification: Do not modify assets-src from drift evidence; run the named review lane first.

decision_matrix.subject: debug_client_dist_atlas
decision_matrix.required_operator_action: Reproduce from the build lane or prune as distribution output; do not use it as source authority.
decision_matrix.next_verification: Do not modify assets-src from drift evidence; run the named review lane first.

decision_matrix.subject: android_assets
decision_matrix.required_operator_action: Review manually before custody, archive, or cleanup claims.
decision_matrix.next_verification: Do not modify assets-src from drift evidence; run the named review lane first.

decision_matrix.subject: incoming_drop_studio
decision_matrix.required_operator_action: Keep as original drop evidence. Promote a specific file only through a source-registration lane.
decision_matrix.next_verification: Do not modify assets-src from drift evidence; run the named review lane first.

decision_matrix.subject: codex_posters
decision_matrix.required_operator_action: Keep as poster/reference output unless a human selects a concrete image for source promotion.
decision_matrix.next_verification: Do not modify assets-src from drift evidence; run the named review lane first.

decision_matrix.subject: debug_client_public_atlas
decision_matrix.required_operator_action: Review manually before custody, archive, or cleanup claims.
decision_matrix.next_verification: Do not modify assets-src from drift evidence; run the named review lane first.

decision_matrix.subject: game_built_assets
decision_matrix.required_operator_action: Review manually before custody, archive, or cleanup claims.
decision_matrix.next_verification: Do not modify assets-src from drift evidence; run the named review lane first.

required_next_gate: Use the closure lanes to choose a review path.
Resolve source-only families by active-source, retained-reference, or promotion-lane decisions.
Resolve drift roots by source promotion, reference retention, or working-surface cleanup decisions.
For archive execution, use only the exact plan approval phrase from the approval ticket and rerun the mapper first.
